title: VillagerBucket
body:
![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbf07733351d4c5b5de6731ab2eee6db5b763a29.png)
This Plugin adds a new way to transport your villagers! Just right click them with an empty bucket, and they will hop in!
You can place them now wherever you want.

![Permissions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9526c42d696a4ef25033aaa304a32add97bfb9f8.png)

```
villagerbucket.use
```

**Give it to everyone, else they can bucket the villagers but will clear the Trades. This can break them!**
